channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics

item.title: Judge halts cannabis license lottery that is precursor to Minnesota marijuana retail launch
item.description: A Ramsey County judge blocked a regulatory agency from holding a license pre-approval lottery after applicants who were denied entry sued the Office of Cannabis Management over the process.
item.dc:creator: Dana Ferguson, MPR News

item.title: NY Dem Rep. Ritchie Torres dubs Gov. Kathy Hochul 'the new Joe Biden,' warns of potential 2026 election loss
item.description: Democratic Rep. Ritchie Torres described New York Gov. Kathy Hochul as "the new Joe Biden" and warned of a possible 2026 gubernatorial election loss.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Biden pardons turkeys Peach and Blossom for his last Thanksgiving event
item.description: President Joe Biden on Monday pardoned the turkeys Peach and Blossom for the traditional presidential pardon ahead of Thanksgiving, which marks the start of Biden’s last holiday season at the White House.
item.dc:creator: The Hill, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Supreme Court won’t hear challenge to graphic cigarette warning labels
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — The Supreme Court won’t hear a challenge to a federal requirement that cigarette packages and advertising include graphic images demonstrating the effects of smoking. The high court declined to hear the case in a brief written order handed down Monday. Tobacco company R.J.
item.dc:creator: LINDSAY WHITEHURST, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Florida health official advises communities to stop adding fluoride to drinking water
item.description: Florida’s surgeon general, Dr. Joseph Ladapo, cited developmental concerns from higher levels of fluoride than are found in most U.S. water supplies.
item.dc:creator: Stephanie Colombini, MPR News

item.title: Battleground Florida: Economist explains potential impact of Trump's tariffs
item.description: On WFLA's Sunday morning political show Battleground Florida, University of Tampa Economics Professor Abiail Hall Blanco explained the purpose of tariffs and how they impact families and businesses in Tampa Bay.
item.dc:creator: Ty Russell, WFLA, NBC

item.title: New Arizona Democrat weighs in on her win and Harris’s loss
item.description: Arizona Rep.-elect Yassamin Ansari (D) shared why she thinks she won in her swing state but Vice President Harris didn’t, while also weighing in on immigration as President-elect Trump prepares his deportation crackdown.
item.dc:creator: Lauren Irwin, NewsNation

item.title: Manchin slams ‘17 educated idiots’ that were advising Biden during COVID
item.description: Independent West Virginia Sen. Joe Manchin said that President Biden had a blind spot to inflation, something he tried warn the president about early in 2021.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Republicans push back against Democrats' claims that Trump intelligence pick Gabbard is compromised
item.description: Republican lawmakers are pushing back against criticism from some Democrats that President-elect Donald Trump’s pick to lead U.S. intelligence services is “compromised” by her comments supportive of Russia and a meeting with an ally of that country.
item.dc:creator: Adriana Gomez Licon, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Trump’s deportation vow alarms Texas construction industry
item.description: Texas builders warn mass deportations of undocumented migrants could devastate the construction industry, threatening housing and infrastructure work in one of the nation’s fastest-growing states.
item.dc:creator: Julian Aguilar, MPR News

item.title: The rising price of paying the national debt is a risk for Trump’s promises on growth and inflation
item.description: Donald Trump has big plans for the economy. He also has big debt problem that’ll be a hurdle to delivering on those plan. Trump has bold ambitions on tax cuts, tariffs and other programs.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, MPR News

item.title: The rising price of paying the national debt is a risk for Trump's promises on growth and inflation
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Donald Trump has big plans for the economy — and a big debt problem that will be a hurdle to delivering on them.
item.dc:creator: JOSH BOAK and FATIMA HUSSEIN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Fred Harris, former US senator from Oklahoma and presidential hopeful, dies at 94
item.description: Fred Harris, a former U.S. senator from Oklahoma, presidential hopeful and populist who championed Democratic Party reforms in the turbulent 1960s, died Saturday. He was 94. Harris’ wife, Margaret Elliston, confirmed his death to The Associated Press.
item.dc:creator: RIO YAMAT, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Anti-abortion groups sue Illinois officials over state insurance law
item.description: The federal lawsuit was filed Wednesday by the Thomas More Society on behalf of six anti-abortion groups.
item.dc:creator: Theodora Koulouvaris, NewsNation

item.title: Canada's top military commander calls out US senator for questioning a woman's role in combat
item.description: HALIFAX, Nova Scotia (AP) — The first woman to command Canada's military called out a U.S. senator on Saturday for questioning the role of women in combat. Gen. Jennie Carignan responded to comments made by Idaho Republican Sen. Jim Risch, the ranking member of the U.S.
item.dc:creator: ROB GILLIES, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Dr. Oz's disputed health claims could jeopardize Senate confirmation
item.description: Oz's ties to online supplement brands and reported health misinformation could jeopardize his confirmation.
item.dc:creator: Ashley Soriano, NewsNation

item.title: In deep blue Minneapolis, many Somali voters withheld support for Harris
item.description: According to state elections data, support for Vice President Kamala Harris in parts of Minneapolis with concentrations of East African immigrants and Somali voters was weaker than in the city as a whole.
item.dc:creator: Cari Spencer, MPR News

item.title: Gaetz says he will not return to Congress
item.description: Former Rep. Matt Gaetz (R-Fla.) said Friday he will not return to Congress after resigning his House seat last week, despite having withdrawn from consideration to be President-elect Trump’s attorney general — but added he is “not going anywhere.
item.dc:creator: Emily Brooks, NewsNation

item.title: Florida officials allege 'pervasive' discrimination against Trump supporters at FEMA
item.description: Florida Attorney General Ashley Moody and U.S. Rep. Vern Buchanan will hold a news conference Friday "to discuss their efforts to uncover evidence of political discrimination at FEMA and demand accountability," according to a release from Buchanan's office.
item.dc:creator: Rachel Tucker, WFLA, NBC

item.title: House passes bill that would allow Treasury to target nonprofits it deems to support terrorism
item.description: The U.S. House passed legislation that would give the Treasury Department unilateral authority to strip the tax-exempt status of nonprofits it claims support terrorism.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, MPR News

item.title: Trump names former Florida AG Pam Bondi as his new pick for U.S. attorney general
item.description: After former Rep. Matt Gaetz withdrew from consideration, President-elect Donald Trump named Pam Bondi, a former attorney general of Florida, as his next pick for U.S. attorney general.
item.dc:creator: NPR Washington Desk, MPR News

item.title: President-elect set to shape ’Trump judiciary’ for next generation
item.description: Legal experts predict President-elect Donald Trump will move quickly next year to cement and extend his legacy in appointing federal judges.
item.dc:creator: Carrie Johnson, MPR News

item.title: Report: Minnesota Lottery needs to tighten up how it regulates retailers
item.description: Minnesota’s Office of the Legislative Auditor reports that the Minnesota State Lottery generally complies with requirements, but has room to improve when it comes to how it manages retailers.
item.dc:creator: Anika Besst, MPR News

item.title: Police report reveals assault allegations against Hegseth
item.description: A woman told police that she was sexually assaulted in 2017 by Pete Hegseth after he took her phone, blocked the door to a California hotel room and refused to let her leave.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, MPR News

item.title: Anti-abortion groups have a to-do list for Trump
item.description: With Trump set to begin another term and Republicans in control of Congress, the anti-abortion movement is hoping to continue the gains it made during his first time in office.
item.dc:creator: Sarah McCammon, MPR News

item.title: Musk, Ramaswamy lay out plans for 'mass' federal layoffs, rule rollbacks under Trump
item.description: Tech entrepreneurs Elon Musk and Vivek Ramaswamy said Wednesday that their brand-new government efficiency panel will identify “thousands” of regulations for President-elect Donald Trump to eliminate, which they argue will justify “mass head-count reductions” across government.
item.dc:creator: Julia Shapero, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Gaetz meets with Senate Republicans as House ethics panel considers releasing report
item.description: Former Rep. Matt Gaetz, Trump's nominee to serve as Attorney General, faces an uphill battle as the House ethics panel considers releasing report on allegations involving sex with a minor.
item.dc:creator: Deirdre Walsh, MPR News

item.title: House Ethics Committee is deadlocked on whether to release Gaetz report
item.description: The U.S. House Committee on Ethics is deadlocked on whether to release its report into former Rep. Matt Gaetz, whose nomination to serve as Trump’s attorney general has been plagued by controversy.
item.dc:creator: Deirdre Walsh and Lexie Schapitl, MPR News

item.title: GOP senators reject replacing FBI background checks for Trump nominees
item.description: Senate Republicans are rejecting a proposal floated by some advisers to President-elect Trump to take the job of conducting background checks for high-level nominees away from the FBI and give it to private investigators.
item.dc:creator: Alexander Bolton, Fox 5

item.title: Trump watches as Musk’s SpaceX launches Starship rocket
item.description: President-elect Donald Trump is expected to attend the launch of a SpaceX rocket in Texas on Tuesday, sources familiar with the plans confirmed, in the latest sign of Trump’s closeness to the company's billionaire CEO Elon Musk.
item.dc:creator: Brett Samuels, Fox 5
